context_for_next_testing_agent:
Admin Subscription Management Testing - Iteration 64:

## Features Tested:
1. Subscription Stats API - Fast load with caching (< 1s)
2. VIP Payments List - Pagination working for all statuses
3. Approve Payment Flow - Activates subscription, sends notification
4. Reject Payment Flow - Modal with predefined Marathi reasons
5. Notification System - Sends rejection reason to user

## Rejection Modal Reasons (Marathi):
- चुकीचा UTR Number
- Screenshot स्पष्ट नाही
- Payment रक्कम जुळत नाही
- Duplicate Payment
- Payment verification failed
- Invalid transaction details
- अन्य (Custom)

## Test Files Created:
- /app/backend/tests/test_admin_subscription_management.py (15 tests)

## Verified Flows:
1. Admin login with PIN
2. Navigate to /admin/subscriptions
3. View Pending/Approved/Rejected tabs
4. Apply filters (time, plan, duration)
5. Approve pending payment
6. Reject payment with Marathi reason
7. User receives notification with rejection reason
